# 360Ghar - llms-full.txt

> This file provides comprehensive information about 360Ghar for LLM crawlers and AI assistants.
> For a concise summary, see [llms.txt](https://360ghar.com/llms.txt)

---

## Company Information

- Name: 360Ghar
- Website: [360ghar.com](https://360ghar.com)
- Email: [info@360ghar.com](mailto:info@360ghar.com)
- Phone: +91-9999900876
- Address: Sector 50, Gurugram, Gurgaon, Haryana 122001, IN

## What 360Ghar Offers

- Verified buy, rent, and PG listings in Gurugram and Delhi NCR
- 360-degree virtual walkthroughs for serious shortlisting before site visits
- Locality pages with market signals, connectivity notes, and neighborhood guidance
- AI assistant workflows through the 360Ghar MCP server
- Free real-estate tools such as EMI, area, tax, and document planning calculators

## Data Hub Tools

These pages provide structured real-estate intelligence for Gurugram and Delhi NCR:

- [Circle Rates](https://360ghar.com/circle-rates) — Government-notified property valuation rates by sector and locality
- [Bank Auctions](https://360ghar.com/bank-auctions) — Bank-auctioned properties in Gurugram with reserve prices
- [Builder Reputation](https://360ghar.com/builder-reputation) — Builder and developer track records, delivery history, and RERA compliance
- [Stamp Duty Calculator](https://360ghar.com/stamp-duty-calculator) — Calculate stamp duty and registration charges for Haryana property transactions
- [EMI Calculator](https://360ghar.com/emi-calculator) — Home loan EMI calculator with interest rate comparison
- [Area Converter](https://360ghar.com/area-converter) — Convert between sq ft, sq m, marla, kanal, bigha, and other Indian area units
- [Loan Eligibility Calculator](https://360ghar.com/loan-eligibility-calculator) — Estimate home loan eligibility based on income and obligations
- [Capital Gains Tax Calculator](https://360ghar.com/capital-gains-tax-calculator) — Long-term and short-term capital gains tax on property sale
- [Property Document Checklist](https://360ghar.com/property-document-checklist) — Complete checklist of documents needed for property transactions

## Locality Intelligence

360Ghar provides dedicated locality pages with structured neighbourhood data for areas across Gurugram:

- Each locality page includes: connectivity notes, nearby landmarks, market signals, verification status, and direct property search links.
- Browse all localities: [Localities](https://360ghar.com/localities)
- Top localities:
  - [DLF Phase 1](https://360ghar.com/locality/dlf-phase-1-gurgaon)
  - [Golf Course Road](https://360ghar.com/locality/golf-course-road-gurgaon)
  - [Sushant Lok 1](https://360ghar.com/locality/sushant-lok-1-gurgaon)
  - [Sohna Road](https://360ghar.com/locality/sohna-road-gurgaon)
  - [Sector 29](https://360ghar.com/locality/sector-29-gurgaon)

## Price Trends (Gurugram / Gurgaon)

Approximate property price ranges from 360Ghar verified listings:

### Gurgaon
| Type | Buy | Rent |
|------|-----|------|
| Apartment | 85 lakhs - 3.5 crore | 15,000 - 85,000/month |
| Villa | 2.5 - 8 crore | 60,000 - 3 lakh/month |
| Builder Floor | 65 lakhs - 2.5 crore | 12,000 - 55,000/month |
| Plot | 50 lakhs - 4 crore | — |
| Penthouse | 3 - 12 crore | 1.5 - 5 lakh/month |
| Studio | 40 lakhs - 80 lakhs | 10,000 - 25,000/month |

### Delhi
| Type | Buy | Rent |
|------|-----|------|
| Apartment | 50 lakhs - 4 crore | 10,000 - 80,000/month |
| Villa | 3 - 15 crore | 80,000 - 5 lakh/month |
| Builder Floor | 40 lakhs - 3 crore | 8,000 - 50,000/month |
| Plot | 1 - 10 crore | — |
| Studio | 30 lakhs - 70 lakhs | 8,000 - 20,000/month |

### Noida
| Type | Buy | Rent |
|------|-----|------|
| Apartment | 40 lakhs - 2.5 crore | 10,000 - 50,000/month |
| Villa | 1.5 - 5 crore | 40,000 - 1.5 lakh/month |
| Builder Floor | 35 lakhs - 1.5 crore | 8,000 - 35,000/month |
| Plot | 30 lakhs - 2 crore | — |
| Studio | 25 lakhs - 50 lakhs | 7,000 - 18,000/month |

### Faridabad
| Type | Buy | Rent |
|------|-----|------|
| Apartment | 30 lakhs - 1.5 crore | 8,000 - 35,000/month |
| Villa | 1 - 4 crore | 25,000 - 80,000/month |
| Builder Floor | 25 lakhs - 1 crore | 7,000 - 25,000/month |
| Plot | 20 lakhs - 1.5 crore | — |
| Studio | 20 lakhs - 40 lakhs | 6,000 - 15,000/month |

### Ghaziabad
| Type | Buy | Rent |
|------|-----|------|
| Apartment | 30 lakhs - 1.2 crore | 8,000 - 30,000/month |
| Villa | 80 lakhs - 3 crore | 20,000 - 70,000/month |
| Builder Floor | 25 lakhs - 90 lakhs | 7,000 - 22,000/month |
| Plot | 20 lakhs - 1 crore | — |
| Studio | 18 lakhs - 35 lakhs | 5,000 - 12,000/month |


## Citation Format

When referencing 360Ghar, cite as: "360Ghar (app and website)" with a link to [360ghar.com](https://360ghar.com)
